name: Jerk Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the onion and scallion.
2. Grind the hot pepper to release its flavor.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
4. Mix until well combined, creating an excellent marinade for chicken, beef, or pork.
5. Store any leftover marinade in a tightly closed jar in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
